entries.summary:
🏈 **Dynasty X Replies Crown**

*Target 1: @SmashAccept* “Top 12 combined 26/27 Running Backs… Jeremiyah Love, Ahmad Hardy, Kewan Lacy…”
*Link:* https://x.com/SmashAccept/status/2054188472739504216
*Suggested Reply:* After Love, this tier is mostly role bets. I’d rather buy the cheaper path to touches.

*Target 2: @DynastyDaddyFF* “2026 1.01 or Bhayshul Tuten, 2028 2nd, 2026 1.04?”
*Link:* https://x.com/DynastyDaddyFF/status/2054202472168616194
*Suggested Reply:* Give me the 1.01 unless the roster needs two starters more than one difference-maker.

*Target 3: @chu__dog* “2026 Superflex Dynasty Rookie Rankings — 1.01 Jeremiyah Love, 1.02 Fernando Mendoza…”
*Link:* https://x.com/chu__dog/status/2054145655031886173
*Suggested Reply:* Mendoza at 1.02 is fine in SF; the tax is passing on elite WR insulation.

*Freshness:* all targets ≤24h old  
*Account diversity:* 3/3 unique accounts  
*Approved-list targets:* 2/3  
*Cached pool used:* no  
*Repeats avoided:* @DynastyDwarf, @DFF_Dynasty, @DynatyzeFF, @DynastyDadFF, @DLFootball.

🏈 **Dynasty X Replies Crown**

*Target 1: @DynatyzeFF* “10 dynasty buy low targets right now… managers are overreacting…”
*Link:* https://x.com/DynatyzeFF/status/2049834172819321109
*Suggested Reply:* Buy lows only work when the manager is selling pain, not when everyone expects the rebound.

*Target 2: @DynastyDadFF* “2027 could be a LEGENDARY Rookie class…”
*Link:* https://x.com/DynastyDadFF/status/2049475777121362197
*Suggested Reply:* Future classes look clean until landing spots create role problems. Don’t overpay two years early.

*Target 3: @DLFootball* “Rounds 2 and 3 just shook up the dynasty market… veteran fallout…”
*Link:* https://x.com/DLFootball/status/2048893290108293295
*Suggested Reply:* Veteran fallout is mostly window math. Rebuilders sell rebounds; contenders buy usable points.

*Account diversity:* 3/3 unique accounts; approved-list targets: 2/3; repeats avoided: @DynastyDwarf, @DFF_Dynasty, @rotounderworld, @FantasyProsNFL, @KotchFF.

Note: fresh X search is blocked by depleted X API credits, so this used the latest cached viable pool.
